name: TEST Params 1
sql:
SELECT e.code, e.name, e.currency
FROM entities e
WHERE e.region = ?pRegion?

name: TEST Params 2
sql:
SELECT a.entity_code, a.account_code, a.amount
FROM actuals a
WHERE a.period = ?pPeriod?
  AND a.entity_code = ?pEntity?

name: TEST Params 3
sql:
SELECT ac.type, SUM(a.amount) AS total
FROM actuals a
JOIN accounts ac ON a.account_code = ac.code
WHERE ac.type = ?pAccountType?
GROUP BY ac.type
HAVING SUM(a.amount) > ?pMinAmount?
